entities.name: Semantic versioning
entities.context: A versioning system used to manage breaking changes.

entities.name: migration scripts
entities.context: Scripts used to facilitate the transition between core versions.

entities.name: Privacy fence
entities.context: A feature to protect user edits in the core.

entities.name: Email send failures
entities.context: An event that requires mitigation strategies.

entities.name: Retry
entities.context: A mechanism used to resend emails after failures.

entities.name: queued outbox
entities.context: A system to hold emails that failed to send.

entities.name: manual review path
entities.context: A process for checking emails that failed to send.

entities.name: Normalization layer
entities.context: A layer to standardize transcript formats.

entities.name: tests
entities.context: Protocols or scripts used to verify the normalization layer.
